name: python3-pywerview
title: python3-pywerview
description:
(partial) Python rewriting of PowerSploit's PowerView (Python 3)
This package contains a (partial) Python rewriting of PowerSploit's PowerView.
PowerView makes it so easy to find vulnerable machines, or list what domain
users were added to the local Administrators group of a machine, and much
more.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pywerview because (partial) Python rewriting of PowerSploit's PowerView (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pywerview as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pywerview [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pywerview.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pywerview with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pywerview --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
